zh.lifeSummary: 當Countess Euphemia Stewart於1201年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾登東納爾德時，她的父親Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland32歲，母親Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus27歲。她和Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1267年在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Euphemia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a Late Greek name derived from eu ‘well, good’ + phēnai ‘to speak’. This was the name of various early saints, notably a virgin martyr said to have been burned at the stake at Chalcedon in 307 . It had a limited popularity in some regions in the 16th and 17th centuries and returned to favour in the Victorian period, especially in the pet form Effie . It is little used at present.

en.lifeSummary: When Countess Euphemia Stewart was born in 1201, in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland, was 32 and her mother, Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus, was 27. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar. She died in 1267, in East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Countess Euphemia Stewart est née en 1201, à Dundonald, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar. Elle est décédée en 1267, à East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

Sie hatte mit Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1267 im Alter von 66 Jahren in East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Countess Euphemia Stewartが1201年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアダンドナルドで生まれた時，父Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotlandは32歳，母Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angusは27歳であった。彼女はPatrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbarとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1267年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Countess Euphemia Stewart(이)가 1201년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 던도널드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1267년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Countess Euphemia Stewart родилась в 1201 г. в местности дундональд, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar. Она умерла в 1267 г. в местности эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.
